# YC Post-Money SAFE Standard Deal (Official, 2026)

## Summary
YC's official 2026 standard deal invests $500,000 split across two SAFEs: $125,000 on a post-money SAFE for 7% fixed ownership, and $375,000 on an uncapped MFN (Most Favored Nation) SAFE. The post-money SAFE has been YC's standard since 2018. YC also receives a pro-rata participation right to invest in subsequent financing rounds. No specific 2026 changes to the SAFE form structure were found; the post-money SAFE form has been stable since 2018. Valuation cap context for 2026: pre-seed caps typically range $3M-$8M; seed caps range $8M-$20M.

## Key quotations / statistics
- "$125,000 on a post-money SAFE = 7% of the company (fixed)"
- "$375,000 on an uncapped MFN (Most Favored Nation) SAFE"
- "YC also receives a pro rata participation right to invest in subsequent financing rounds to maintain their ownership stake"
- "With a post-money SAFE, ownership percentage is calculated simply: Investment ÷ Post-Money Valuation Cap = Ownership %"
- "For example, $375,000 invested at a $15M post-money valuation cap converts to 2.5% of the company"
- "pre-seed SAFE caps typically range $3M-$8M, while seed caps range $8M-$20M"
- "Stacking more than $1.5M-$2M in SAFEs signals it's time to price a round"

## Annotations for stinger-forge
- This is the anchor source for `guides/02-safe-mechanics.md`. The SAFE form has been stable since 2018 but the stinger should note the research could not confirm any 2026-specific amendments - flag as an open question.
- The two-SAFE structure (fixed percentage + uncapped MFN) is specific to YC batch companies and should not be presented as the generic post-money SAFE model.
- The "stacking more than $1.5M-$2M in SAFEs signals it's time to price a round" heuristic is practical guidance for the SAFE mechanics guide.
- YC's own pro-rata right means that even if a founder is not a YC company, understanding how YC's pro-rata works helps model what sophisticated bees will ask for in side letters.
- Command Brief open question to flag: "Has YC updated the SAFE form for 2026?" Research found no evidence of changes since 2018.
